name: CIRCLES Method
what_it_is: Structured framework for scoping product solutions - Comprehend, Identify, Report, Cut, List, Evaluate, Summarize.
core_mechanic: Walk through each step to prevent jumping to solutions before the problem is fully understood.
when_to_use: Feature scoping where requirements are fuzzy / Preparing for design review / "What to build" conflated with "what problem to solve"
when_not_to_use: Strategic decisions (CIRCLES is feature-level) / Already have a clear problem definition
ideaos_application: Agent 3 walks through first four steps (C-I-R-C) to sharpen scope, surfaces top 2 solution options with explicit tradeoff statements.
